channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download XMedia Recode 3.6.2.8
item.description: XMedia Recode is software to change the quality for video files on windows operating system, it has the ability to change quality, video format. XMedia Recode supports the format conversion such as 3GP, 3GPP, 3GPP2, AAC, AC3, AIFF, AMR, ASF, AU, AVI, DIVX, DTS, DVR-MS, FLV, H. 261, H. 263, H. 264, M4A, M1V, M2V, M4V, MKV. Parameters advanced The user can step into the more advanced and modify bitrate, frame interval the frame rate, modes, speed control and many other settings regarding...

item.title: Download Mass Image Compressor 4.2.2

MassImageCompressor reduces image size significantly (>90%) according to user-selected size and quality parameters. Reduce large numbers of images in a folder (and optional subfolders) with just one click. Batch compressing images for websites, emails or mobile storage has never been easier! Most...

item.title: Download NewFileTime 8.21
item.description: NewFileTime is a small utility independence allows you to change date modified, Created and Accessed of any file. You can modify the dates for one or multiple files, even entire folder structures at the same time. The date can be changed to a date and time specific or you can choose to make each file "older" or "younger," according to a certain number of days. item.title: Download TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 9.0.0 Beta 1
item.description: TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 is a program that allows users to discover hidden settings in Windows 11. This application is specially designed for Windows 11, groups many registry settings and distribute them from the easy and secure user interface. With TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 you can move the Windows taskbar to the top and resize the taskbar by editing the registry value. It can effectively clone your entire disk or partition, providing a reliable solution for data backup. item.title: Download Desktop.ini Editor 1.2
item.description: The desktop.ini file is a hidden Windows operating system configuration settings file located in every folder and is used to store information about how Windows folders are organized. Basically, if the layout or settings for a folder is changed, a desktop.ini file is automatically created to save those changes. Information about Desktop.ini Editor software Desktop.ini Editor is a portable freeware to simplify Desktop.ini operations, it can help you to edit desktop.ini files and set...

item.title: Download Perfectly Clear WorkBench 5.1.0.3179
item.description: Perfectly Clear Workbench is an application that uses image editing libraries Perfectly Clear by Athentech and is provided to demonstrate the capabilities of the Perfectly Clear processing libraries, which recognize faces and allow quick export of processing settings for use. One of the key features in Workbench is the ability to "export to API" when saving a Preset. This allows you to make image edits in Workbench and adjust the settings to suit your editing style and needs. You can...

item.title: Download CalendarTask (formerly DesktopCal) 3.28.272.8702
item.description: CalendarTask (formerly DesktopCal) is a simple desktop calendar that blends into your desktop without blocking access to your desktop icons. You can double-click on a date to quickly add notes and also jump to specific dates in the past or future. CalendarTask - Computer calendar CalendarTask can use your current wallpaper or loop through images from your folder and update your desktop every few minutes. The program helps you make appointments, make plans... Not only that, the Screen...

item.title: Download Syncovery Premium 11.14.3.184
item.description: Syncovery Pro Enterprise is a great application used to back up data and to synchronize personal computers, servers, laptops, notepads and storage online. The software comes with support for FTP and secure FTP servers, SSH, WebDAV, Amazon S3, http, update the part file, ZIP compression, data encryption, and schedule automatic backups. Syncovery Pro Enterprise have the ability to freely select files and folders across the whole folder hierarchy in tree view and supports email...

item.title: Download PassFab 4EasyPartition 4.0.1.0
item.description: After using your PC for many years, there are bound to be many files you want to transfer to your new PC. PassFab 4EasyPartition can perform a one-click migration saving you hours of reinstalling operating systems and applications. It has an intuitive interface and step-by-step wizard that makes migrating the system in just a few steps. PassFab 4EasyPartition will effectively solve the problem of low disk space, speed up your computer and make it run faster. Features of PassFab...

item.title: Download EverNote 11.11.2.6992
item.description: EverNote is the all in one tool allows you to track notes, todo items, memos, outlines, excerpts, websites, ideas and other things and automatically synchronize them between multiple computers and mobile devices (iPhone, Android, etc.). You can choose to sort their notes into categories, password protect them, export them to XML and more. EverNote supports a number of pattern notes allow you to add to-do list, spreadsheet like Excel to calculate costs (automatic sum), notes, phone, contact...

item.title: Download NTFS Permissions Auditor Pro 26.4.7
item.description: NTFS Permissions Auditor Pro is a software to quickly and easily audit directory permissions in your Windows system. It allows you to quickly analyze, verify and review any NTFS folder permissions and provides additional features like powerful, customizable filtering, exporting to different formats, etc. Features of NTFS Permissions Auditor Pro Get up and running with just one install. Instant and accurate details about NTFS permissions for all target folders. Filters combine many...

item.title: Download Tails 7.6.1
item.description: Tails is a live operating system that you can boot on almost any computer from a USB memory stick or DVD. Tails does this by using the distribution classic Gnome of Linux. The top navigation bar allows you quick access to "Applications" and "Places" so you can easily access what you need quickly and easily and not lost. Tails - independent operating System for security Menu "apps" provide shortcuts for bundled software, including graphics, audio and video, office, system tools, and...
